54328285.title: Penelope Knatchbull, Countess Mountbatten of Burma

pageprops.defaultsort: Mountbatten of Burma, Penelope Knatchbull, Countess of

54328285.extract: Penelope Meredith Mary Knatchbull, Countess Mountbatten of Burma (née Eastwood; born 16 April 1953) is a British aristocrat and the wife of Norton Knatchbull, 3rd Earl Mountbatten of Burma. Since 2010, she has served as High Steward of Romsey.
